---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for MAP-HMS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? What pain point does it address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Cases
Describe specific use cases where this feature would be valuable:
1. Use case 1
2. Use case 2
3. Use case 3

## Implementation Considerations
If you have ideas about how this could be implemented:
- Technical requirements
- Database changes needed
- API endpoints required
- UI/UX considerations

## Priority
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical - Blocks current workflow
- [ ] High - Significantly improves experience
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

## Target Users
Who would benefit from this feature?
- [ ] Students
- [ ] Guards
- [ ] Campus Managers
- [ ] Administrators
- [ ] Other: [please specify]

## Module Impact
Which modules would this feature affect?
- [ ] Onboarding
- [ ] Imports
- [ ] Rooms
- [ ] Out-Pass
- [ ] Gate
- [ ] Visitors
- [ ] Attendance
- [ ] Checklists
- [ ] Tickets
- [ ] Notices
- [ ] Laundry
- [ ] Sports
- [ ] Other: [please specify]

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided a clear problem statement
- [ ] I have described the proposed solution
- [ ] I have considered implementation aspects
- [ ] I have checked existing documentation for related features
